chapters.title: Introduction
chapters.description: Understand the terminal and Linux before typing commands

lessons.title: The Terminal and the Linux World
lessons.description: Try the clear command in the terminal and get used to sending commands with Enter.

chapters.title: Directories and Files
chapters.description: Learn the Linux filesystem and basic commands

lessons.title: Listing and Navigating Directories
lessons.description: Use ls and cd to explore the file hierarchy and list directory contents.

lessons.title: Showing Hidden Files and Details
lessons.description: Use ls -a to list all files including the hidden .config file.

lessons.title: Specifying Locations with Paths
lessons.description: Use cd with absolute paths, relative paths, and ~, then verify with pwd.

lessons.title: Understanding Directory Hierarchy
lessons.description: Use tree to inspect the layout, then cd to the app directory three levels deep.

chapters.title: Creating and Managing Files
chapters.description: Learn to create, copy, move, and delete files and directories

lessons.title: Creating Files and Directories
lessons.description: Use mkdir and touch to create directories and empty files.

lessons.title: Copying Files and Directories
lessons.description: Use cp to copy a file into another directory.

lessons.title: Moving and Renaming Files
lessons.description: Use mv to rename a file and move it into another directory.

lessons.title: Deleting Files and Directories
lessons.description: Use rm and rmdir to delete unneeded files and an empty directory.

lessons.title: File Operations Review
lessons.description: Combine Chapter 1–2 commands to organize files.

chapters.title: Viewing File Contents
chapters.description: Learn how to view and inspect text files

lessons.title: Displaying File Contents
lessons.description: Use cat to display the contents of a text file.

lessons.title: Reading the Beginning and End of Files
lessons.description: Use head and tail to view the beginning and end of a log file.

lessons.title: Counting Lines and Words in Files
lessons.description: Use wc to count lines and words in a file.

chapters.title: Users and Ownership
chapters.description: Learn about users, owners, and groups

lessons.title: Understanding User Accounts
lessons.description: Use whoami to see which user you are logged in as.

lessons.title: Identifying File Owners and Groups
lessons.description: Use ls -l to see each file's owner and group.

lessons.title: Sharing a Computer Among Users
lessons.description: Read ls -l output when files from different users are mixed together.

chapters.title: File Permissions
chapters.description: Learn file permissions with rwx and chmod

lessons.title: Reading File Access Permissions
lessons.description: Read permission strings (rwx) from ls -l output.

lessons.title: Changing File Permissions
lessons.description: Use symbolic chmod to add execute permission to your file.

lessons.title: Understanding Access Denied Errors
lessons.description: Confirm that cat, rm, cd, and chmod are blocked without permission.

lessons.title: Setting Permissions with Octal Mode [Advanced]
lessons.description: Set permissions with octal chmod (644, 755).

chapters.title: root and sudo
chapters.description: Learn about the root user and privileged operations with sudo

lessons.title: Understanding the root Administrator
lessons.description: Use ls -l to inspect system files owned by root.

lessons.title: Running Commands with Elevated Privileges
lessons.description: Use sudo ls /root to list a directory with root privileges.

lessons.title: Changing File Ownership
lessons.description: Use sudo chown to transfer a root-owned file to user.

chapters.title: Search and Filter
chapters.description: Learn file search and text filtering with grep and find

lessons.title: Searching Text Within Files
lessons.description: Use grep to extract ERROR lines from a log file.

lessons.title: Refining Text Search
lessons.description: Use grep -n and grep -c options.

lessons.title: Finding Files by Name
lessons.description: Use find to search for .txt files.

lessons.title: Matching Filenames with Patterns
lessons.description: List files of a specific extension using wildcards.

chapters.title: Pipes and Redirects
chapters.description: Learn to connect command output with pipes and redirects

lessons.title: Saving Command Output to Files
lessons.description: Redirect ls output to a file.

lessons.title: Feeding File Contents to Commands
lessons.description: Use input redirection with grep.

lessons.title: Connecting Commands with Pipes
lessons.description: Count ERROR lines using pipes.

lessons.title: Combining Search and Redirection
lessons.description: Combine grep and redirection to save ERROR lines.

lessons.title: Search and Pipes Review
lessons.description: Combined exercise for grep, pipes, and redirection.

chapters.title: Shell Basics
chapters.description: Learn shell features like command history, Tab completion, and man/--help

lessons.title: Reusing Previous Commands
lessons.description: Practice command history with ↑↓ keys.

lessons.title: Completing Commands and Paths with Tab
lessons.description: Use Tab completion to navigate directories.

lessons.title: Looking Up Command Documentation
lessons.description: Look up command usage with --help and man.

lessons.title: Inspecting Settings with Environment Variables
lessons.description: Display HOME and USER environment variables with echo.

lessons.title: Running Multiple Commands at Once
lessons.description: Chain cd and ls with && on one line.

chapters.title: Processes
chapters.description: Learn process basics including PIDs, ps, and kill

lessons.title: Viewing Running Programs
lessons.description: Use ps to view the list of running processes.

lessons.title: Stopping Running Programs
lessons.description: Use kill to terminate a process by PID.

lessons.title: Running Programs in the Background
lessons.description: Use jobs to understand background job concepts.

chapters.title: Network
chapters.description: Learn network command concepts such as curl

lessons.title: Fetching Data from the Web
lessons.description: Fetch data from a mock API with curl and save it to a file.

lessons.title: Network Command Concepts
lessons.description: Review curl and network command concepts.

chapters.title: Capstone
chapters.description: Practice combining everything you've learned in hands-on exercises

lessons.title: Organizing Scattered Files
lessons.description: Combine mkdir, cp, mv, and rm to organize files.

lessons.title: Analyzing Logs for Errors
lessons.description: Use grep, wc, and pipes to count ERROR lines in a log.

lessons.title: Setting Up a Shared Folder
lessons.description: Set shared directory permissions with chmod, chown, and sudo.

lessons.title: Final Dojo Challenge
lessons.description: Comprehensive capstone combining core curriculum commands.
